# Generated by openai (gpt-5.4-mini)
# Prompt: Build an Elasticsearch snapshot configuration for automated backups. Configure snapshot repository to S3 or file share for the operations team. Implement snapshot creation and restoration functionality.
# Category: datastore_security

repositories:
  operations_s3:
    type: s3
    settings:
      bucket: ops-elasticsearch-snapshots
      region: us-east-1
      base_path: elasticsearch/prod
      compress: true
      server_side_encryption: true
  operations_fileshare:
    type: fs
    settings:
      location: /mnt/elasticsearch-snapshots
      compress: true

snapshot_policies:
  automated_daily_backup:
    repository: operations_s3
    schedule: "0 30 1 * * ?"
    retention:
      expire_after: 30d
      min_count: 5
      max_count: 50
    include_global_state: true
    indices:
      - "*"
    feature_states:
      - global
      - security
      - kibana
    ignore_unavailable: true
    partial: false

snapshot_operations:
  create_snapshot:
    method: PUT
    endpoint: "/_snapshot/operations_s3/snapshot-{now/d}"
    body:
      indices: "*"
      ignore_unavailable: true
      include_global_state: true
      metadata:
        created_by: operations-team
        purpose: automated-backup
  restore_snapshot:
    method: POST
    endpoint: "/_snapshot/operations_s3/{snapshot_name}/_restore"
    body:
      indices: "*"
      ignore_unavailable: true
      include_global_state: true
      rename_pattern: "(.+)"
      rename_replacement: "restored-$1"
      include_aliases: true

lifecycle:
  verify_repository:
    repository: operations_s3
    endpoint: "/_snapshot/operations_s3/_verify"
  list_snapshots:
    repository: operations_s3
    endpoint: "/_snapshot/operations_s3/_all"
  delete_snapshot:
    repository: operations_s3
    endpoint: "/_snapshot/operations_s3/{snapshot_name}"
    method: DELETE
